title: hemionitis flexuosa
intro: Hemionitis flexuosa, also known as the flexible hemionitis or flexible fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hemionitis flexuosa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to digestive issues.
